calendar.matters:
Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Mar-20-2007 Granted Per Written Order

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-27-2007 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Mar-20-2007 Continued To Apr-10-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: F. Butler.
Scott Hames, Esq. special appearance for Plaintiff: Lorraine S. Roberts, not present.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Hill Brothers Chemical Company.
Matter is put over to April 10, 2007 at 9:00 A.M. in Dept. 218, appearance is waived.
Counsel to prepare and submit an Order waving live testimony of witness and to prepare Proposed Judgement.

1:30 P.M.
Order granting waiver of live witness at Default Prove-Up Hearing, signed and filed in court.
Proposed Judgment rec'd in court and granted as follows:
Damages $32,408.00
Attorney's Fees $1,400.00
Costs $474.00, for a total of $34,282.00

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Mar-01-2007 Continued To Mar-20-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Ron Sinclair.
Scott Hames, Esq. for Plaintiff: Lorraine S. Roberts, not present.
Matter is continued to Mar. 20, 2007 at 9:00 A.M. in Dept. 218, for appearance of Plaintiff or Witness.

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Feb-01-2007 Continued To Mar-01-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
MINI MINUTES: This cause came up on calendar for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day. Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert CSR: JOYCE LONG

Atty. Stephen M. Fishback, Esq. appearing for the Plaintiff. Counsel continued the matter to March 1, 2007.
